caption: Table 158. Document revision history
rows: Corrected maximum CPU frequency in Table 3: STM32H7Sxx8 features and peripheral counts. Added Section 6: Electrical characteristics.

Updated: – Table 2: Security and graphics IP availability per product line (replaced TIL by HDP) – Junction maximum temperature in Table 3: STM32H7Sxx8 features and peripheral counts and Section 6: Electrical characteristics – Table 21: STM32H7Sxx8 pin and ball descriptions (indicated pins with fm+ capable I/O structure 'FT_fh'. Added footnotes.) – Table 22: STM32H7Sxx8 pin alternate functions (added PG12 to PG15) – In Section 6: Electrical characteristics aligned maximum temperature entries to 130°C – Table 26: General operating conditions – SDRAM waveforms and timings – Figure 12: UFBGA176 SMPS GFx pinout – Figure 26: External components for SMPS step-down converter – Table 30: SMPS step-down converter characteristics for external usage – Table 31: Inrush current and inrush electric charge characteristics for LDO and SMPS – Table 43: Typical and maximum current consumption in System Stop mode through Table 51: Typical and maximum current consumption: data write 6.25% toggle on 16-bit memory – Table 66: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (wide VCO frequency range) – Table 67: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (medium VCO frequency range) – Table 68: PLL1/2/3 SSCG parameter ranges – Table 101: XSPI characteristics in DTR mode (with DQS)/Hyperbus – Section 7.7: UFBGA169 package information (A0YV) – Section 7.11: TFBGA225 package information (B04V) – Table 157: Package thermal characteristics (typo corrected)

Updates: – Cover page features – Figure 1: STM32H7Sxx8 block diagram – Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme – Table 21: STM32H7Sxx8 pin and ball descriptions indicated pins with I/O structures 'TF_uc' and 'TF_ud'. – Table 64: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (wide VCO frequency range) (title) – Table 65: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (low VCO frequency range) (title and content). – Removed previous document revision Table 66 and Table 67.

Updates: – Core description on cover page – Table 5: Overview of low-power mode monitoring pins – Table 21: STM32H7Sxx8 pin and ball descriptions – Introduction text removed in Output buffer timing characteristics (HSLV option disabled) – Table 23: Voltage characteristics – Table 26: General operating conditions – Table 58: PSSI transmit timing diagram – Table 117: PSSI transmit characteristics – Table 134: OTG_HS current consumption characteristics – Table 135: UCPD electrical characteristics.
Updated: – Table 2: Security and graphics IP availability per product line – Table 3: STM32H7Sxx8 features and peripheral counts

Updated: – V parameter in Table 23: Voltage characteristics and Table 26: General IN operating conditions. – f footnote about 600 MHz operation in Table 26. CPU – I/O structure definitions in Table 20: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table – V changed to V in Table 64: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (wide VCO DDA DD frequency range) and Table 65: PLL1/2/3 characteristics (low VCO frequency range). Added notes concerning power supply connections for various configurations (GPIO, XSPI, FMC, and so on) in Table 21: STM32H7Sxx8 pin and ball descriptions. Changed all occurrences of V to V . DDUSB DD33USB
